name: Pasta with Asparagus Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Asparagus, blanched and cut into 1-inch pieces
1/2 cup Ham, sliced into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Cook garlic for 1 minute until fragrant.
3. Add pasta and cook according to package instructions until al dente. Drain the pasta.
4. In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta with the oil and garlic.
5. Add the tuna chunks, ham strips, black olives, lemon juice (or wine vinegar), salt, and pepper.
6. Toss well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
7. Serve at room temperature or refrigerate until cold if desired.
